prestazioni: AM28 6.0L V12 (AM09/AM11 engine code) forced induction conversion using a Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger with billet compressor wheel, 1.05 A/R turbine housing, and TiAL MV-R 44mm external wastegate, paired with a custom 4-inch stainless steel downpipe and a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for 12 psi peak boost (stock internals retained for reliability).

Full Motec M150 ECU standalone engine management system with individual cylinder fuel trims, custom camshaft timing maps, and integrated traction control, calibrated by Dynojet UK for 750+ WHP on 100-octane fuel, utilizing Bosch Motorsport 2000cc injectors and a Radium Engineering dual-catch can system with -10AN lines.

Bilstein B16 PSS10 coilovers with custom valving for the V12 Vantage’s aluminum-intensive chassis, paired with Eibach Pro-Street S anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and polygraphite bushings from SuperPro, along with a full Whiteline front subframe brace and rear toe control links for improved turn-in response.
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber widebody conversion kit (V12 Vantage-specific, not Vantage F1 or V8 variants), including extended front fenders, rear quarter panels, and a custom rear diffuser with integrated twin exhaust exits for the GT300-style dual-can setup.

Vorsteiner V-FF 1071 forged carbon fiber front splitter with adjustable dive planes and a custom 3D-printed aluminum support bracket for the V12 Vantage’s unique front bumper geometry, paired with a full carbon fiber rear wing from Anderson Composites (GT3-spec, 1,200mm width) with Gurney flap and integrated third brake light.

OEM+ interior overhaul featuring a full Alcantara headliner, Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shell, FIA-approved) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses, and a custom MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel with quick-release hub and integrated AIM MXS Strada dash display for real-time boost, oil pressure, and AFR monitoring.
